title: Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 3
content:
{{Top|rwm|new|italics=1}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:XWingOmnibus3Cover.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Omnibus:
X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 3'' |writer=[[Michael A. Stackpole]] |penciller= |inker= |letterer= |colorist= |cover artist=[[Douglas Wheatley]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[July 4]], [[2007]]{{DarkHorse|url=Books/13-912/Star-Wars-Omnibus--X-Wing-Rogue-Squadron-Volume-3|text=Star Wars: Omnibus--X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 3}} |other date= |media type=Trade paperback |pages=360 |isbn=1593077769 |isbn2= |timeline=[[4 ABY/Legends|4]]–[[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] |series=''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]''/''[[Star Wars Omnibus]]'' |issues=Volume 3 |preceded by=[[Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 2|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 2'']] |followed by=[[Star Wars Omnibus: Tales of the Jedi Volume 1|''Tales of the Jedi Volume 1'']] }} '''''Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 3''''' is the third [[Star Wars Omnibus]] by [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]] collecting several issues of the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' comics. It was published on [[July 4]], [[2007]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''The galaxy's greatest starfighters take flight once more in a mission to reclaim the galactic capital Coruscant from the Empire! Whether this becomes the New Republic's finest hour or its darkest defeat lies squarely on the shoulders of Wedge Antilles and his team of ace X-Wing pilots—Rogue Squadron!'' ''In full color on high-quality paper for an unbeatable price, this massive volume contains issues #21-35 of Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron, encompassing In the Empire's Service, The Making of Baron Fel, Family Ties, Masquerade, and Mandatory Retirement''. ''Follow the rise of the Empire's deadliest pilot Baron Fel, marvel at the machinations of Imperial power-player Ysanne Isard, and discover the fate of Interim-Emperor Sate Pestage in the book that collects one of the most epic sagas in ''Star Wars'' into a single volume for the first time!'' ===Back cover summary=== ''For the first time in a [[19 BBY/Legends|generation]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|those opposed]] to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] have a chance to reclaim the galactic capital [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Whether this becomes the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] finest hour or its darkest defeat lies squarly on the shoulders of [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and his team of ace [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] pilots - [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]!'' ''Witness the rise of the Empire's deadliest pilot [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Baron Fel]], follow the machinations of Imperial power-player [[Ysanne Isard]], and discover the fate of [[Emperor/Legends|Interim Emperor]] [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]] as one of the most epic sagas in ''[[Star Wars]]'' unfolds.'' ==Contents== *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 21|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 21]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 22|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 22]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 23|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 23]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 24|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 24]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 25]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 26|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 26]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 27|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 27]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 28|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 28]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 29|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 29]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 30|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 30]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 31|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 31]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 32|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 32]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 33|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 33]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 34|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 34]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 35|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 35]] ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:XWingOmnibus3Cover.jpg|Cover File:X-Wing_Rogue_Squadron_Vol_3_cover.png|Cover art ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Books/13-912/Star-Wars-Omnibus--X-Wing-Rogue-Squadron-Volume-3|text=Star Wars: Omnibus--X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 3}} {{XWingRogueSquadronNav}} {{Interlang |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: ანთოლოგია: X-ფრთებიანები: განდგომილების ესკადრილია, ტომი 3 |pl=Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron 3 }} [[Category:Star Wars Omnibus|X-Wing Rogue Squadron 3]]
